data.title: A new address spent $2.75 million to buy 21.11 million WLFI tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created address (0xc58...0e6c) spent $2.75 million USDC to buy 21.11 million WLFI tokens at a price of $0.13 per token. This address currently holds $11.21 million USDC and may have used it all for this purchase.

data.title: STOCKS | India's Stock Market Faces Challenges Amid New Regulations
data.description: India's stock market, valued at $5.2 trillion, has experienced a slow start this year. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the market could encounter additional pressure due to new regulatory measures aimed at moderating trading activity. These measures add to existing concerns regarding corporate profit growth and foreign investment flows. The combination of these factors may influence the market's performance in the coming months.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Israel Plans to Phase Out U.S. Military Aid Over Next Decade
data.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced plans to gradually reduce Israel's reliance on U.S. military aid to zero within the next ten years. According to Jin10, Netanyahu made this statement during an event hosted by the Conference of Presidents of Major American Jewish Organizations on February 15. He emphasized that Israel aims to transition from an aid-based relationship with the United States to a partnership, with the ultimate goal of establishing a fully autonomous defense industry.

data.title: Ripple, Coinbase Powered Crypto Super PAC Gears Up For Midterms With A War Chest Of $190 Million
data.description:
The cryptocurrency sector is increasing its political spending ahead of the midterm elections, aiming to replicate the success it achieved during the 2024 federal races. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/crypto/cryptocurrency/26/02/50635500/ripple-coinbase-powered-crypto-super-pac-gears-up-for-midterms-with-a-war-chest-of-190-million?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=referral

data.title: Natural Gas Prices Decline Amid Warmer Weather Forecasts
data.description: Natural gas prices in the United States have fallen to their lowest level in four months due to predictions of warmer weather, which is expected to reduce heating demand. Bloomberg posted on X that the anticipated rise in temperatures has led to a decrease in the demand for natural gas, impacting its market value. This decline comes as the energy sector closely monitors weather patterns, which significantly influence heating needs and, consequently, natural gas consumption. The warmer weather forecast suggests a potential reduction in energy consumption, affecting the natural gas market dynamics.

data.title: A whale went long on 100,000 ETH and is currently experiencing a paper loss of $5.852 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a whale that had previously accumulated 105,000 ETH long positions took profits on 32,000 ETH at $2094.02 yesterday afternoon. In the past 13 hours, it added another 24,000 ETH at $1972.16, worth $47.33 million. Currently, this whale holds 55,000 ETH at a single address, and a total of 100,000 ETH across two addresses. This position currently shows a floating loss of $7.045 million. After deducting the previous profit of $1.193 million, the overall floating loss remains $5.852 million.

data.title: Telkom Indonesia Plans Stake Sale in Data Center Business Amid Growing Interest
data.description: Telkom Indonesia is reportedly renewing efforts to sell a stake in its data center division, aiming to capitalize on increasing demand for digital infrastructure assets. Bloomberg posted on X, citing sources familiar with the matter, that the company is seeking to attract investors interested in the burgeoning digital infrastructure sector. This move comes as the global appetite for data centers continues to grow, driven by the expanding need for digital services and cloud computing. Telkom Indonesia's decision to revisit the stake sale underscores the strategic importance of data centers in the digital economy. The company is expected to engage with potential investors to explore opportunities for collaboration and investment. Details regarding the size of the stake or the timeline for the sale have not been disclosed. Telkom Indonesia's initiative reflects a broader trend among telecommunications companies to leverage their digital assets in response to evolving market dynamics.

data.title: JSW MG Motor India Plans Major Investment in New-Energy Vehicle Market
data.description: JSW MG Motor India, a subsidiary of China's SAIC Motor, is set to invest up to $441 million in India's burgeoning new-energy vehicle sector. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's strategic move to establish a strong foothold in the rapidly expanding market. This investment underscores the growing interest and competition in the new-energy vehicle industry in India, as companies vie for leadership in this sector. JSW MG Motor India's commitment reflects the broader trend of automotive manufacturers focusing on sustainable and innovative transportation solutions. The investment aims to capitalize on the increasing demand for environmentally friendly vehicles, aligning with global shifts towards cleaner energy sources. As the market evolves, JSW MG Motor India is positioning itself to be a key player in driving the transition to new-energy vehicles in the region.

data.title: Cardano's ADA Price Stabilizes as Whales Accumulate
data.description: Cardano's ADA is showing early signs of stabilization, with significant accumulation by large holders. According to NS3.AI, whales have acquired over 220 million ADA, suggesting confidence in the asset's future appreciation. Long-term holders are also maintaining their positions, as indicated by the Mean Coin Age reaching a three-month high. If ADA can sustain its key support level at $0.271, it may rebound towards resistance levels of $0.303 and $0.354. However, failure to hold this support could result in a decline to $0.245.

data.title: Singapore's Housing Market Experiences Slow Start in New Year
data.description: Singapore's new home sales have begun the year sluggishly, with recent projects receiving varied reactions from buyers. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the cautious approach of potential homeowners amid current market conditions. The mixed responses reflect broader uncertainties in the real estate sector, as buyers weigh their options carefully. This trend underscores the challenges faced by developers in attracting interest and closing deals in the current economic climate.

data.description:
Ethereum price started a fresh decline and traded below $2,000. ETH is now consolidating and remains at risk of another decline below $1,940. Ethereum struggled to extend gains above $2,050 and corrected lower. The price is trading below $2,000 and the 100-hourly Simple Moving Average
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/eth/ethereum-price-reverses-under-2000/

data.title: Bitcoin’s Short-Term Indicator Tests Critical Recovery Level
data.description:
According to a report shared by CryptoQuant, Bitcoin’s Short-Term Holder SOPR (Spent Output Profit Ratio) has reclaimed the key 1. 0 threshold after briefly dipping into capitulation territory. Recently, STH SOPR moved below 0. 95, a zone historically associated with short-term capitulation
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoins-short-term-indicator-tests-critical-recovery-level/

data.title: BlueScope Steel Aims for U.S. Growth with North Star Expansion
data.description: BlueScope Steel is set to focus on expanding its operations in the United States following its decision to reject a takeover bid from Steel Dynamics and SGH last month. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's strategy to enhance its North Star operations and develop premium products as part of its growth plan. This move underscores BlueScope's commitment to strengthening its presence in the U.S. market.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Spot Gold Prices Fall Below $5,000
data.description: Spot gold prices have dropped below the $5,000 mark, currently trading at $4,994.38 per ounce. According to Odaily, the price has seen a daily decline of 0.93%.

data.title: Zora Set to Unlock 166.67 Million Tokens on February 23
data.description: Zora (ZORA) is scheduled to unlock approximately 166.67 million tokens on February 23 at 21:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is valued at around $3.51 million, based on data from the Web3 asset data platform RootData. The upcoming token unlock is part of Zora's ongoing strategy to manage its digital assets.

data.title: SOON Token Scheduled for Unlocking on February 23
data.description: Web3 asset data platform RootData reports that approximately 21.88 million SOON tokens are set to be unlocked on February 23 at 13:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, the unlocked tokens are valued at around $4.02 million. This event marks a significant moment for the SOON token holders and the broader cryptocurrency market.

data.title: VDX Receives Licenses to Operate Virtual Asset Services in Hong Kong
data.description: Digital asset trading platform VDX announced today that Victory Fintech Company Limited has been granted licenses by the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission under the Securities and Futures Ordinance. According to Foresight News, these licenses allow the company to conduct Type 1 (dealing in securities) and Type 7 (providing automated trading services) regulated activities. Additionally, VDX Custody Limited has been licensed under the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance to offer digital asset custody services. These licenses enable VDX to operate a virtual asset trading platform in Hong Kong and provide infrastructure and related services to licensed financial institutions.

data.title: India AI Summit Attracts Global Attention Amid New Developments
data.description: The India AI Summit in Delhi is drawing significant interest from global investors and industry leaders. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the event's focus on new AI models and partnerships. The summit is a gathering of prominent figures in the AI sector, showcasing the latest advancements and collaborations. As the AI industry continues to evolve, the summit serves as a platform for discussing future trends and opportunities in artificial intelligence.
